stemHtml: You are flying an aircraft with the autopilot ON. Which of the following statements is true in the case of an automatic trim failure?

options.a: The human pilot must disconnect the autopilot and assume control over the aircraft in order to avoid trim runaway.
options.b: There will be no difference in aircraft behaviour as long as the autopilot stays engaged; however, the human pilot must be prepared for high aerodynamic loads when disconnecting the autopilot.
options.c: The autopilot can still be used to control the aircraft; however, the human pilot must manually adjust the trim surface position to cancel out any constant loads.
options.d: The autopilot will disconnect and issue an appropriate warning. The pilot flying (PF) must be ready to take over control.
